meaning: n.[昆]蛱蝶 Vanessa 瓦内萨(女子名)
examples: Some parents are worried too for example, Vanessa Holburn, thirty two, who has two girls under the age of four.
Kobe Bryant and his wife, Vanessa, both signed statements of their own, also under oath.
Still, students Vanessa Savalos(ph) and Julia Galchenko(ph), are appalled by the new policy governing blogs.
